title: Forbidden Library
description: A datapack adding a collection of custom enchantments.
body:
[
![open_for_commission](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/htqpg9tm66jj27g0gjsbd/comission.png?rlkey=cwfa6r72f8m6fg23jch6ylyi0&st=w3x86wi9&dl=1)
](https://www.fiverr.com/s/gDe5gQb)

# The library of forbidden enchantments...
![head_image_presentation_v2](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/85f44kt0nnbn9mpxw2g19/forbidden_library_title.png?rlkey=9764ss4mfz25ayjyq5ddswxi2&st=orvea8ik&dl=1)
Forbidden Library is a datapack/mod that adds a curated collection of original custom enchantments designed to expand gameplay, without sticking to a single theme.

Enchantments may affect weapons, tools, shields, projectiles, or TNT, and are all available directly from the enchanting table.

This datapack/mod is designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds and aims to feel balanced within a survival environment.

In datapack version there is a value file in function root you can change some value if you want to.

### ⚠ WARNING ⚠
- For Fabric version [FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is needed.
- For the datapack version a resource pack is needed.
- Some enchantments for flint and steel or shields must be obtained through enchanted books and 
cannot be applied directly to the item in enchanting table.
- Datapack and mod are only translated in english and french.

<details>
<summary>List of enchantments</summary>

### Desert Marauder
- Max level : 1
- Support : Boots
- Description : Increases movement speed and reduces fall damage while in hot biomes such as deserts and badlands. Mutually exclusive with Icy Breeze.


### Icy Breeze
- Max level : 1
- Support : Boots
- Description : Increases movement speed, reduces fall damage, and improves movement efficiency in cold and icy biomes. Cannot be combined with Desert Marauder.


### Tuff Enough
- Max level : 5
- Support : Armor pieces
- Description : Increases the player’s maximum health by half a heart per enchantment level.


### Marathon
- Max level : 4
- Support : Leggings and boots
- Description : Increases the player’s movement speed.


### Lightness
- Max level : 3
- Support : Bows, Crossbows and Trident
- Description : After firing, projectiles briefly remaining silent and suspended in the air before returning to normal behavior.


### Quick Fuse
- Max level : 3
- Support : Flint and steel
- Description : Reduces the explosion delay of TNT. Cannot be combined with Visco Fuse.


### Visco Fuse
- Max level : 3
- Support : Flint and steel
- Description : Increases the explosion delay of TNT. Cannot be combined with Quick Fuse.


### Detonation
- Max level : 5
- Support : Flint and steel
- Description : Causes TNT to split into multiple explosions when it detonates, depending on the enchantment level.


### Vaccinator
- Max level : 1
- Support : Shields
- Description : Holding a shield removes negative status effects at the cost of increased shield durability loss. Durability penalty is reduced when the shield has Unbreaking.


### Tactical Reload
- Max level : 3
- Support : Crossbows
- Description : When firing a crossbow, grants a chance to instantly reload it with an arrow. Higher enchantment levels increase the chance.


### Gossamer
- Max level : 1
- Support : Bows
- Description : Arrows create web-based traps by connecting to the nearest entity on impact, ensnaring the target in cobwebs. Applies an additional bow durability cost, reduced by Unbreaking.


### Silken Step
- Max level : 3
- Support : Swords
- Description : Entities trapped in cobwebs take bonus true damage that ignores armor when struck. This effect limits the weapon’s base attack damage to a single point. Cannot be applied with sharpness and other damage-boosting enchantments.


### Grounded
- Max level : 1
- Support : Tridents
- Description : Useless without Loyalty. Forces the trident to return even while still in mid-air. If the trident falls too low in the world, it is forcefully recalled. Does not activate if the player throws the trident while sneaking.


### Grand Finale
- Max level : 3
- Support : Flint and Steel
- Description : Increases the explosion power of TNT.


### Refuge
- Max level : 3
- Support : Shields
- Description : When the holder’s health drops below 2 hearts, grants an Absorption effect based on the enchantment level. Does not activate if the player already has Absorption. Damages the shield; durability loss is reduced by Unbreaking.


### Shockproof
- Max level : 4
- Support : Armor pieces
- Description : Increases knockback resistance and reduces lightning damage.


### Poise
- Max level : 4
- Support : Swords and Trident
- Description : Slightly increases attack reach. Jumping doubles the reach bonus and reduces the attack cooldown between sword strikes.


### Tidal Wave
- Max level : 4
- Support : Trident
- Description : While airborne, hitting an entity propels the player based on movement direction. Sneak-hitting applies additional knockback to the target. Throwing the trident in water and hitting a target launches the player strongly forward.


</details>
